description:
Perform an envelope retrofit on a commercial building by upgrading the roof insulation and window properties, then evaluate the new cooling load on a peak summer day.

Starting State: Energy3D is launched. The baseline commercial building model is available at `~/Documents/Energy3D/office_baseline.ng3`.

Expected Actions:
1. Open the file `~/Documents/Energy3D/office_baseline.ng3`.
2. Upgrade the roof insulation: Select the roof and change its U-value to 0.15 W/m²K.
3. Upgrade the window glazing: Select all windows on the building and modify their properties to represent high-performance double-pane Low-E glass:
   - Set U-value to 1.4 W/m²K
   - Set SHGC (Solar Heat Gain Coefficient) to 0.25
4. Set the simulation date to July 15 (a peak summer day).
5. Run a Daily Energy Analysis for the building (Analysis > Buildings > Daily Energy Analysis for Selected Building).
6. Review the analysis results graph and identify the total 'Cooling' energy requirement (in kWh).
7. Save the modified project as `~/Documents/Energy3D/office_upgraded.ng3`.
8. Create a text file at `~/Documents/Energy3D/cooling_results.txt` containing only the numerical cooling energy value you identified.
